title: Use arborist climbing techniques
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Use arborist climbing techniques demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare site and inspect equipment

pcs.text: Confirm access to site and scope of works according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm access to site and scope of works according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm access to site and scope of works according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), record and implement control measures according to workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Confirm availability of first aid and rescue personnel, equipment and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm availability of first aid and rescue personnel, equipment and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm availability of first aid and rescue personnel, equipment and procedures.

pcs.text: Conduct pre-operational preparations and safety checks, on ropes, harnesses, tools and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct pre-operational preparations and safety checks, on ropes, harnesses, tools and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pre-operational preparations and safety checks, on ropes, harnesses, tools and equipment.

pcs.text: Select, check and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare site and inspect equipment

elements.title: Prepare to access tree

pcs.text: Inspect tree to determine efficient safe access route and method through discussion with work team
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect tree to determine efficient safe access route and method through discussion with work team?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect tree to determine efficient safe access route and method through discussion with work team.

pcs.text: Select and prepare climbing equipment according to manufacturer instructions, work health and safety regulations and industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare climbing equipment according to manufacturer instructions, work health and safety regulations and industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare climbing equipment according to manufacturer instructions, work health and safety regulations and industry standards.

pcs.text: Configure climbing equipment components to form functional tree climbing system appropriate to the access method selected
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Configure climbing equipment components to form functional tree climbing system appropriate to the access method selected?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Configure climbing equipment components to form functional tree climbing system appropriate to the access method selected.

pcs.text: Tie, dress, set and finish climbing knots and hitches according to climbing system requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Tie, dress, set and finish climbing knots and hitches according to climbing system requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Tie, dress, set and finish climbing knots and hitches according to climbing system requirements.

pcs.text: Sharpen, prepare and fit climbing spurs and gaffs for dismantling work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sharpen, prepare and fit climbing spurs and gaffs for dismantling work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sharpen, prepare and fit climbing spurs and gaffs for dismantling work.

pcs.text: Conduct pre-climb checks of configured systems to ensure compatibility, safety and function according to climbing system, industry standards and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct pre-climb checks of configured systems to ensure compatibility, safety and function according to climbing system, industry standards and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pre-climb checks of configured systems to ensure compatibility, safety and function according to climbing system, industry standards and manufacturer instructions.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select suitable anchor points according to load bearing and access requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install low-risk anchor points using throw lines.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect and test remotely installed anchor points are secure before use.

pcs.text: Ascend tree and access work positions within tree crown using climbing systems appropriate for work task and tree structure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ascend tree and access work positions within tree crown using climbing systems appropriate for work task and tree structure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ascend tree and access work positions within tree crown using climbing systems appropriate for work task and tree structure.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Configure and use components within functional climbing systems for ascending trees and work positioning.

pcs.text: Access work positions within tree crown by using climbing techniques for both pruning and dismantling work tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access work positions within tree crown by using climbing techniques for both pruning and dismantling work tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access work positions within tree crown by using climbing techniques for both pruning and dismantling work tasks.

pcs.text: Communicate with work team during operations according to work site and environmental conditions using methods agreed with work team
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with work team during operations according to work site and environmental conditions using methods agreed with work team?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with work team during operations according to work site and environmental conditions using methods agreed with work team.

pcs.text: Observe and maintain safe clearance from hazards and climbing and rigging equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe and maintain safe clearance from hazards and climbing and rigging equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe and maintain safe clearance from hazards and climbing and rigging equipment.

pcs.text: Maintain awareness and clearances for avoiding electrical power lines according to workplace safety procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain awareness and clearances for avoiding electrical power lines according to workplace safety procedures.
